title: Myles' Chains
body:
# THIS MOD IS NOT BEING WORKED ON AS IM MAKING A NEW VERSION FOR 1.21.4, STAY TUNED PEOPLE!


Do You Ever Feel Like There's No New Weapons In Minecraft, Well Your in Luck As I Have Made Some More Weapons!

![Chain Recipe (Sorry For Bad Texture On Item, It Placeholder As Actual item Is 3D Model)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73520dce6bf69f69b64ffe767e9444db0108f95f.png)

Introducing, CHAINS! Craft Chains, A Weapon That Does Low Damage But Is Very Customizable, Use Enchantments To Add New Thing (eg: The Wither Spikes Enchantment Effect Withe On To A Enemy!)

New Enchantments Coming Soon!
